title: Plumblink Mossel Bay, honoured with Best Plumbing Supplier award
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Plumblink Mossel Bay Plumblink is thrilled to announce that its Mossel Bay branch has been awarded the esteemed Best Plumbing Supplier title, a recognition that underscores the store’s unwavering commitment to quality and customer satisfaction.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Plumblink Mossel Bay Plumblink is thrilled to announce that its Mossel Bay branch has been awarded the esteemed Best Plumbing Supplier title, a recognition that underscores the store’s unwavering commitment to quality and customer satisfaction."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“This award is a proud moment for us,” said Jacques Bruwer, area manager at Plumblink."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“It reflects the dedication and expertise of our Mossel Bay team, whose passion for service excellence truly makes a difference.”","html":"“It reflects the dedication and expertise of our Mossel Bay team, whose passion for service excellence truly makes a difference.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Serving both professional plumbers and home improvement enthusiasts, Plumblink Mossel Bay offers a comprehensive selection of trusted plumbing products.","html":"Serving both professional plumbers and home improvement enthusiasts, Plumblink Mossel Bay offers a comprehensive selection of trusted plumbing products."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Customers can find top house brands such as Plumline, Brassman, Copperman, Viscosity, and Masco, along with exclusive access to Genebre products.","html":"Customers can find top house brands such as Plumline, Brassman, Copperman, Viscosity, and Masco, along with exclusive access to Genebre products."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With a strong footprint across South Africa, Plumblink continues to empower local communities through expert advice, dependable products, and a welcoming in-store experience.","html":"With a strong footprint across South Africa, Plumblink continues to empower local communities through expert advice, dependable products, and a welcoming in-store experience."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Mossel Bay team remains focused on delivering the high standards that earned them this prestigious accolade.","html":"The Mossel Bay team remains focused on delivering the high standards that earned them this prestigious accolade."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Customers are encouraged to visit the Mossel Bay store to discover Plumblink’s award-winning service and extensive product range.","html":"Customers are encouraged to visit the Mossel Bay store to discover Plumblink’s award-winning service and extensive product range."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, visit www.plumblink.co.za.","html":"For more information, visit www.plumblink.co.za."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
